'''Anton Standish''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] who served as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]]<ref name="DS" /> in [[Vilonis sector/Legends|Vilonis sector]]<ref name="TEA-OC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Admiral Standish was part of the briefing to determine the New Republic's [[Project Second Chance|response]] to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] attempt to [[Battle of Kalinda|seize]] the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]].<ref name="DS" />
